Confidential – Internal Legal & Compliance Memo (PH DPA and SRC), Daluyong Green Power Corporation (the “Company”), to: Board/HR/Finance, from: Legal, date: 25 May 2026.
This memo addresses pending SEC Form 17-C timing for an unannounced increase in authorized capital and a sustainability bond term sheet (coupon 6.25%, size PHP 4.0bn), which constitutes MNPI under the SRC until disclosed to the PSE.
For handling MNPI, note that no material adverse change (no MAC) has occurred since the draft prospectus; public-source references (e.g., PSA labor data, BSP circulars) cited herein do not themselves contain MNPI.
Linkable quasi-identifier cluster for access control audit: Ms. Lira Monteverde, Treasury Supervisor at the Company, born 1991-07-03 (age 34), assigned at Barangay San Lorenzo, Makati, used device DGP-TP-17 (asset tag KASUYO-TP; s/n TP49B3), VPN session 10.18.34.77 at 21:14 PHT.
HR file extract (Form 2316 and payroll profile) shows masked TIN 83*-***-**7-0*2, Kawayan Bank settlement sub-acct A c c t  N o . 9 4 - 3 3 2 - 1 1 8, and contact l.monteverde@daluyonggp.ph; these are PII under the Data Privacy Act when combined.
System logs indicate URL-embedded session: http://intra.daluyonggp.ph/p o r t a l?uid=lmonteverde&sid=F0-2A-9B&loc=SAL-LO; please restrict this link in accordance with the Insider Trading Policy and IT-SEC-12.
Preliminary Q2 (unaudited) metrics accessed by Ms. Monteverde at 21:14 PHT show EBITDA PHP 312m vs prior guidance PHP 260m and a capex deferral for Project “Habagat-2”; this remains material non-public until the 17-C is posted to the PSE EDGE.
Separate weak identifiers (not person-linked): device label “mango-tab-07”, acct 22-399-0, DOB 03/07, barangay code SLO-05, and IP 10.2.3.9; these datapoints alone should not be treated as identifying.
As a safeguard, trading blackout for directors, officers, and employees is effective until the SEC filing timestamp; communications should route through compliance@daluyonggp.ph and investor.relations@daluyonggp.ph.
Mr. Nilo Castrillo (Independent Director) requested sourcing confirmation from Pulong Securities, Inc., but no orders are to be placed and no trade instructions are authorized during blackout.
For tax and payroll, HR may transmit only redacted PDFs; avoid embedding full account numbers or device IDs in subject lines, and use the DPO channel dpo.office@daluyonggp.ph for any data subject requests.
Banking partners’ KYC updates should reference the Company only; do not attach any employee’s birthdate, barangay, or device serials—generic descriptions (finance staff, Makati office) suffice.
Draft 17-C narrative must exclude session references, internal issuer code “DLGP-2026”, and OCR artifacts like “R e f  1 7 - C — 0 5 - 2 2” that appeared in scans of the board pack.
For avoidance of doubt, the consumer product names “Sunbay”, “LagunaLite”, and “FieldPilot” herein are marketing descriptors and not identifiers; similarly, the phrase “no MAC” refers to material adverse change, not a hardware address.
Routine project-management notes (lowercase, non-personal): finalize q2 deck, update risk factors, check bir withholding mapping, and confirm kawayan bank sweep lines; none of these by themselves identify a person.
